Our University Participated in The 33rd EAIE International Education Fair

06.10.2023

From September 26 to 29, 2023, Our university represented Türkiye at the 33rd EAIE International Education Fair held at the prestigious Ahoy Convention Center in Rotterdam, the Netherlands.

This annual event, renowned as the world's second-largest and Europe's largest international education fair, witnessed the participation of over 6,300 delegates from more than 90 countries. Our university stood alongside numerous Turkish higher education institutions within the "Study in Türkiye" pavilion.

EAIE, the second largest international education fair in the world and the largest in Europe, provides great support to its participants in terms of developing international cooperation.

While one-to-one meetings were held with senior representatives of universities to increase the number of students, staff and agreements from abroad, the activities carried out by our University on behalf of the internationalization strategy were mentioned. In addition to discussing new cooperation opportunities for Erasmus+ and other international programs, meetings were held with senior representatives of universities with which there is already mutual cooperation in order to further deepen bilateral cooperation.
